name: Time Bank Admin: confirmar registro por e-mail (fila/cron)

nodes.name: Schedule (a cada 1 min)
nodes.notes: Busca itens não enviados na fila, envia e marca como sent.

parameters.query:
WITH to_send AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM public.adv_time_bank_entry_notifications
  WHERE sent_at IS NULL
    AND (locked_at IS NULL OR locked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')
  ORDER BY queued_at ASC
  LIMIT 50
),
locked AS (
  UPDATE public.adv_time_bank_entry_notifications n
  SET locked_at = NOW(),
      error = NULL
  WHERE n.id IN (SELECT id FROM to_send)
  RETURNING n.*
)
SELECT * FROM locked;

nodes.name: Lock + Buscar fila (sent_at IS NULL)
nodes.notes: Requer credencial do Postgres/Supabase no n8n.

parameters.subject: =Confirmação do seu registro de ponto — {{ $json.type_label }}

nodes.name: Send Email (Usuário)
nodes.notes: Configure credencial SMTP e ajuste o 'From' se necessário.

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.adv_time_bank_entry_notifications
SET sent_at = NOW(),
    locked_at = NULL,
    error = NULL
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';

nodes.name: Mark sent_at
nodes.notes: Requer credencial do Postgres/Supabase no n8n.
